---
title: "Cecil Kerr, Mch\'ness of Lothian"
---

## Cecil Kerr, Mch\'ness of Lothian

**Dates:** (1808-1877)

**Maiden name:** (Talbot)

### Description

Dowager Marchioness of Lothian, friend of the Rev. Robert F. Wilson (24 Sept 1846)

### Biography

Lady Cecil Talbot (1808-1877) had married (1831) the 7th Marquess of Lothian (1794-1841).  She must be the referred to as her son did not marry until 1857.  She paid for one of the windows in Hursley Church.  She became a Roman Catholic in June 1851, taking with her all her children except the eldest son [ODNB;  Moor, <i>Guide to Hursley</i> 15 ]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
